name: Commercial Lease Agreement
description: A legally binding contract for renting out commercial property such as an office, retail store, or warehouse.
content:
COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Commercial Lease Agreement (the "Lease") is made and entered into on {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Landlord and the Tenant named below.

1. THE PARTIES

A. LANDLORD
Name/Company: {{landlord_name}}
Tax ID/Reg No: {{landlord_tax_id}}
Address: {{landlord_address}}

B. TENANT
Name/Company: {{tenant_name}}
Tax ID/Reg No: {{tenant_tax_id}}
Address: {{tenant_address}}

2. LEASED PREMISES AND PERMITTED USE

Address of Leased Premises: {{property_address}}
Property Type: {{property_type}}
Permitted Use: The Tenant shall use the Premises solely for the purpose of {{permitted_use}} and for no other purpose without the prior written consent of the Landlord.

3. TERM OF LEASE

Lease Duration: {{lease_duration}} {{duration_unit}}
Commencement Date: {{formatDate start_date}}

4. RENT AND PAYMENT TERMS

Base Monthly Rent: {{monthly_rent}} ({{rent_in_words}}) + Applicable Taxes ({{tax_rate}}%)
Rent Due Date: Rent is payable in advance on or before the {{due_day}} day of each month.
Payment Method: {{payment_method}} (Bank Details: {{bank_details}})

5. RENT ESCALATION

At the end of each Lease Year, the Base Monthly Rent shall be increased by {{rent_escalation_rate}}. This increase is mandatory to account for inflation and market adjustments.

6. SECURITY DEPOSIT

Upon execution of this Lease, the Tenant shall deposit with the Landlord the sum of {{security_deposit}} as a Security Deposit. The deposit shall be returned to the Tenant within a reasonable timeframe after the expiration of the Lease, less any deductions for unpaid rent or damages to the Premises beyond normal wear and tear.

7. ALTERATIONS AND SUBLETTING

The Tenant shall not make any material alterations or improvements to the Premises without the Landlord's prior written consent.

Subletting: {{#if (eq subletting_allowed 'No')}}The Tenant may not assign this Lease or sublet any portion of the Premises without the Landlord's express written consent.{{else}}The Tenant may assign or sublet the Premises with prior notice to the Landlord.{{/if}}

8. UTILITIES, TAXES, AND MAINTENANCE

Utilities: The {{#if (eq utilities_paid_by 'Tenant')}}Tenant{{else}}Landlord{{/if}} shall be responsible for paying all utility services including electricity, water, gas, and internet used on the Premises.
Taxes: The Landlord is responsible for property taxes. The Tenant is responsible for any business, sales, or operational taxes related to their specific use of the Premises.

9. TERMINATION AND SURRENDER

Upon the expiration or earlier termination of this Lease, the Tenant shall surrender the Premises to the Landlord in good and broom-clean condition, ordinary wear and tear excepted.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Commercial Lease Agreement as of the date first above written.

LANDLORD
{{landlord_name}}

Signature: _________________________

TENANT
{{tenant_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: property_type
fields.label: Property Type
fields.placeholder: e.g., Retail Store, Office Space, Warehouse

fields.name: permitted_use
fields.label: Permitted Use (Business Purpose)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Operating a restaurant, Accounting firm

fields.name: due_day
fields.label: Rent Due Day (Day of the month)
